# Local Task DB Lease Registry

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/lockingdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Locking / Lease SSOT](../locking.md)

A task DB source using RIIDO_TASK_DB_SOURCE_PATH stores a lease sidecar next to the task DB file.

| task DB path | lease registry path | lock path |
| --- | --- | --- |
| task-db.json | task-db.leases.json | task-db.json.lock |

The schema version is riido-runtime-lease-registry.v1.

```json
{
  "schema_version": "riido-runtime-lease-registry.v1",
  "task_db_path": "/path/to/task-db.json",
  "updated_at": "2026-05-25T00:00:00Z",
  "leases": [
    {
      "lease_id": "runtime-lease:task-1:1",
      "task_id": "task-1",
      "runtime_id": "runtime-codex",
      "capability_fingerprint": "sha256...",
      "claimed_at": "2026-05-25T00:00:00Z",
      "lease_until": "2026-05-25T00:00:30Z",
      "fencing_token": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

The current local JSON lease TTL is 30 seconds. It is a local claim fencing window for reducing crash handoff time, not the provider process maximum runtime.
